 {"id":"phage_explorer-hto","title":"Advanced: Functional Synteny Elastic Alignment","description":"Align gene order between phages using dynamic time warping on gene family sequences. MMseqs2 clustering offline. Synteny continuity scores, module conservation metrics. Dual gene bars with elastic bands linking orthologous modules; breakpoint markers. Highlights rearrangements beyond sequence identity. Novelty: Medium-high.","notes":"## FUNCTIONAL SYNTENY ELASTIC ALIGNMENT

**Full TypeScript Implementation from Roadmap**

### Concept
Use Dynamic Time Warping to align gene orders between phages, revealing conserved synteny blocks, rearrangement breakpoints, and module boundaries.

### Mathematical Foundations

**Gene Family Encoding:**
```
S_p = [F(g1), F(g2), ..., F(gn)]

where F(g) = protein family ID from clustering (MMseqs2)
```

**Dynamic Time Warping:**
```
DTW(i, j) = d(ai, bj) + min(
  DTW(i-1, j) + 0.5,    // gap in B
  DTW(i, j-1) + 0.5,    // gap in A
  DTW(i-1, j-1)         // match/mismatch
)

where d(ai, bj) = 0 if same family, 1 otherwise
```

**Synteny Continuity Score:**
```
SCS = matched_pairs_in_order / max(|A|, |B|)

Range: 0 (shuffled) to 1 (perfect synteny)
```

### Complete TypeScript Implementation

- `SyntenyBlock` (phageA/B ranges, genes, score)
- `SyntenyAnalysis` (DTW distance, synteny score, blocks, breakpoints)
- `dtw()` Dynamic Time Warping with traceback:
  - DP matrix initialization
  - Cost computation with gap penalties
  - Path traceback for alignment
- `alignSynteny()` main function:
  - Encode genes as family sequences
  - Run DTW alignment
  - Extract conserved blocks (≥2 genes)
  - Calculate synteny score
  - Identify breakpoints

### Conserved Block Detection
- Consecutive matches in DTW path
- Minimum block size threshold
- Block score = coverage fraction
- Module annotation (replication, morphogenesis, tail)

### TUI Features
- Dual gene bars (T4 top, T7 bottom)
- Elastic bands linking orthologous modules
- Conserved blocks highlighted (█)
- Rearrangement markers (╳)
- Block detail table with positions and module assignments
- Rearrangement summary (inversions, insertions)
- [B] Jump to block, [R] Show rearrangements, [M] Module view

### Why It's Valuable
- Beyond sequence similarity to organizational conservation
- Module discovery via synteny
- Rearrangement history reconstruction
- Engineering guidance (genes that must stay together)

Novelty: 8/10, Pedagogical: 9/10, Wow Factor: 8/10","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-07T05:18:15.661616Z","updated_at":"2025-12-07T22:31:21.648283Z","closed_at":"2025-12-07T22:31:21.648283Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-hto","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ojb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T05:20:54.600570Z","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","title":"Tests: regressions for mobile QuickStats swipe, SequenceView scroll, 3D fullscreen","description":"## Purpose
Add targeted regression coverage for three high-visibility mobile UX issues:
- `phage_explorer-3r5p` QuickStats (top status bar) swipe conflict
- `phage_explorer-39gi` SequenceView scroll black flash / renderer stability
- `phage_explorer-o5y7` 3D fullscreen black screen

## Scope
- Prefer fast unit/integration tests that run in `bun test` for day-to-day guardrails.
- Add an e2e script (Playwright or equivalent) only if it can run reliably in CI; otherwise, document a deterministic local script + screenshots/console logging.

## Proposed tests
1) **Swipe guard test**
   - Mount the main content area (or the swipe handler in isolation).
   - Dispatch touchstart/touchend events originating inside `.quick-stats`.
   - Assert next/prev phage actions are NOT invoked.

2) **Sequence renderer smoke test**
   - Create a canvas in a DOM-like environment and instantiate `CanvasSequenceGridRenderer`.
   - Run a render tick (or call the internal render via a safe public API).
   - Assert it does not throw and paints a non-empty frame.

3) **3D fullscreen resume test**
   - Mock IntersectionObserver to simulate offscreen → fullscreen transition.
   - Ensure entering fullscreen forces `requestRender()` and clears any paused state.

## Logging
- Tests should log context (mobile emulation settings, viewport sizes, relevant flags) on failure.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] These regressions are covered by automated tests such that a future reintroduction fails CI quickly.
- [ ] Logs on failure are actionable (what surface, what state, what event sequence).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"TealPond","created_at":"2026-01-13T07:11:33.669169479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-26T18:02:36.208190162Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-39gi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T04:42:23Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-3r5p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T04:42:23Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-o5y7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T04:42:23Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.4","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-26T04:42:23Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":158,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","author":"SilentBear","text":"FYI: Added/updated mobile regression coverage and re-verified green:
-  (swipe guard)
-  (sequence renderer smoke)
-  (iOS fullscreen shell / unpause invariants)

Also added an iOS hardening tweak in : listen to  (in addition to ) when updating , since some Safari builds report URL bar show/hide via scroll without firing resize.

Validated: , , bun test v1.3.6 (d530ed99) all ✅.","created_at":"2026-01-26T18:01:37Z"},{"id":159,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-i0vo","author":"SilentBear","text":"Correction: my previous comment got mangled by shell backticks. Here are the exact file paths + commands.

Regression coverage:
- packages/web/src/App.mobileSwipe.test.ts (swipe guard)
- packages/web/src/rendering/CanvasSequenceGridRenderer.smoke.test.ts (sequence renderer smoke)
- packages/web/src/components/Model3DView.fullscreen.test.tsx (iOS fullscreen shell / unpause invariants)

iOS hardening tweak:
- packages/web/src/main.tsx now listens to visualViewport.scroll (in addition to resize) when updating CSS var --visual-viewport-height.

Validated:
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
- bun test packages/web/src","created_at":"2026-01-26T18:02:36Z"}]}

 {"id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.2.4","title":"A11y: ControlDeck labels, tab order, and touch target audit","description":"### Background
`packages/web/src/components/mobile/ControlDeck.tsx` is a primary mobile interaction surface. It needs consistent accessibility:
- meaningful labels for screen readers
- predictable tab order
- sufficient touch target sizes

### Goal
Audit and fix accessibility issues in the ControlDeck.

### Touchpoints
- `packages/web/src/components/mobile/ControlDeck.tsx`
- `packages/web/src/styles/control-deck.css`","acceptance_criteria":"- All ControlDeck actions have accessible names.
- Focus styles are visible when navigating by keyboard.
- Touch targets meet a reasonable minimum size.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-13T10:19:19.869413310Z","updated_at":"2025-12-13T10:51:44.229943975Z","closed_at":"2025-12-13T10:51:44.229943975Z","compaction_level":0}
 {"id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.2.5","title":"A11y: high-contrast QA across core workflow","description":"### Background
The app has a high-contrast mode toggle, but it should be verified across the core workflow (sequence grid, overlays, glossary, control deck). Premium UX requires that contrast mode looks intentional, not broken.

### Goal
Audit high-contrast styling and fix obvious issues (focus rings, borders, text contrast, icon visibility).

### Touchpoints
- `packages/web/src/App.tsx` (contrast toggle)
- `packages/web/src/styles/*`
- core components: header, overlays, glossary, control deck","acceptance_criteria":"- High-contrast mode improves readability across the core workflow.
- Focus indicators remain visible.
- Icons and badges remain legible.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-13T10:19:36.927029706Z","updated_at":"2025-12-13T21:31:54.066226401Z","closed_at":"2025-12-13T21:31:54.066226401Z","compaction_level":0}
 {"id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.3","title":"Implement progressive disclosure","description":"NOTE: Progressive disclosure is tracked as a dedicated pillar in `phage_explorer-rhs0` (experience levels, onboarding, gating). Keep this Phase-7 issue as a checklist pointer; close it when `phage_explorer-rhs0` and its key dependents are complete.

Create user tier system with three levels: novice (simplified UI, tooltips), intermediate (balanced features), and power (all advanced features). Implement session tracking to monitor feature usage patterns. Add feature gating logic to hide advanced features from novice users. Implement tier promotion logic based on usage milestones and explicit user preference. Store tier preference in localStorage. Add settings panel to manually override tier. Include onboarding flow for first-time users.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-08T17:58:10.501707Z","updated_at":"2026-01-08T22:45:52.062886Z","closed_at":"2025-12-16T21:08:40.295230685Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.3","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-rhs0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T03:01:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.3","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-wzjl","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T03:01:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
